summary: Frontend testing completed for Peruvian poultry restaurant management system. PurchasesPage crash fix confirmed working. All 7 modules navigation tested successfully. Core functionality verified.

minor_issues.issue: Complex dropdown selectors in raw material and other forms may need more specific data-testid attributes for robust testing
minor_issues.impact: Testing automation could be improved, but functionality works

passed_tests: PurchasesPage loads correctly at /compras (crash fix confirmed)
All 7 pages navigation working: Inicio, Compras, Produccion, Mermas, Materia Prima, Productos Cocidos, Dashboard
Sidebar navigation stable across all modules
Purchase form opens and accepts input
Raw material form opens and accepts input
No React crashes or console errors
Modal dialogs open and close properly
